Value Added Tax (VAT) is levied on the sale of goods or services by businesses. VAT is a type of consumption tax that is placed on a product whenever value is added at a stage of production and at final sale. Format for VAT number should be Country code GB followed by standard: 9 digits (block of 3, block of 4, block of 2 – e.g. GB999 9999 73. The VAT number can be validated on HMRC\r\nEuropa
